title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 64.003 - Farm buildings and farm structures, limitation on certain fire protection or fire prevention ordinances
text:
64.003.  Farm buildings and farm structures, limitation on certain fire protection or fire prevention ordinances. — Notwithstanding any provision of law to the contrary, no fire protection or fire prevention ordinance adopted by any county in this state shall be exercised so as to impose regulations or to require permits with respect to the erection, maintenance, repair, alteration, or extension of farm buildings or farm structures.
(L. 2025 S.B. 271)
